reply.text: You know our first couple fight is happening in this gym right

messages.text: Our first fight is you stalking my gym selfies
I just came here to file my boyfriend application actually
Application rejected, HR said vibes too unserious 😭😭
HR just mad they not getting this gym couple content
Gym couple, You still on level treadmill, relax?
im on the level where I cheer from the sidelines
So youre the emotional support water bottle then
You love the sound of you
Interns become CEOs once they survive leg day arguments
You would cry three reps into leg day honestly
ill cry but ill not quit, very on brand
Cute speech, still does not earn gym boyfriend title
Then give me a probation period, ill clock in
Probation requires post workout smoothie bribes at least
